title: T-030 — SCR-07-01 Scheduler Dashboard Gantt (read-only)
prompt:
# T-030 — SCR-07-01 Scheduler Dashboard Gantt (read-only)

PRD: 07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md §8.1 SCR-07-01, §4.1.5, §16.2 OQ-EXT-05 (drag-drop DESCOPED)
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/dashboard.jsx:9-363 (`pext_dashboard_gantt`)
UX: design/07-PLANNING-EXT-UX.md:248-470
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement /scheduler page rendering horizontal Gantt (Y=lines, X=time) READ-ONLY (no drag-drop per OQ-EXT-05) with allergen-color WO blocks, changeover blocks (diagonal stripe), shift boundaries, KPI strip, run banner.

## Implementation contract
1. New route `apps/web/src/app/scheduler/page.tsx` (Server Component) loads active scheduler_runs row + assignments via `/api/scheduler/runs/:id` query helper.
2. Client component `apps/web/src/components/scheduler/GanttBoard.tsx` renders Gantt grid; uses CSS grid (no drag handlers — read-only per OQ-EXT-05).
3. Top bar with horizon toggle (7d/14d), line filter, [Run Scheduler] button (opens MODAL-07-01 = T-032).
4. Click WO block → side panel (T-031); changeover blocks rendered between consecutive WOs from changeover_matrix join.

## Files
- apps/web/src/app/scheduler/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/scheduler/GanttBoard.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/scheduler/GanttCell.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/scheduler/__tests__/GanttBoard.test.tsx [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/dashboard.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a completed scheduler_run with 5 assignments, when /scheduler renders, then Gantt grid shows 5 WO blocks colored by allergen_group, top bar with horizon toggle/line filter/[Run Scheduler], KPI strip at bottom
2. Given the production page renders, when compared to prototype design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/dashboard.jsx:9-363, then it has the same Y-axis lines list, same X-axis day default, same allergen color tokens, and same shadcn primitives (Card, Badge, Button) — verified by RTL snapshot + parity checklist (structural, visual, interaction parity per Step 7)
3. Given a user clicks a WO block, when click fires, then side panel opens (does NOT trigger drag — drag handlers are absent per OQ-EXT-05 verified via RTL absence assertion)

## Test strategy
- RED: write apps/web/src/components/scheduler/__tests__/GanttBoard.test.tsx (RTL + vitest) covering grid rendering + parity snapshot + drag-handler absence
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test scheduler/GanttBoard'

## Risk red lines
- Do not implement drag-drop reassignment (DESCOPED OQ-EXT-05)
- Do not bypass RBAC at page level (Planner Advanced + Scheduling Officer + Prod Manager only)
- Do not load full WO row in Gantt (use side panel lazy-load)

pipeline_inputs.description: Read-only horizontal Gantt scheduler dashboard (Y=lines, X=time) with allergen color blocks, changeover stripes, top bar, KPI strip.
pipeline_inputs.details: Server Component loads active run; client GanttBoard renders grid with CSS grid (no drag handlers per OQ-EXT-05). Allergen color tokens from design system. Click WO opens side panel. Parity contract: structural (lanes per line, blocks per WO), visual (allergen tokens, shadcn Card/Badge/Button), interaction (click only, no drag). Translation notes: useState for filters, useForm for run modal, controlled state for line filter; mock PEXT_LINES → Drizzle query in loader.
out_of_scope: Do not implement side panel here (T-031)
Do not implement Run Scheduler modal here (T-032)

Given the production page renders, when compared to prototype design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/dashboard.jsx:9-363, then it has the same Y-axis lines list, same X-axis day default, same allergen color tokens, and same shadcn primitives (Card, Badge, Button) — parity verified by RTL snapshot + checklist (structural + visual + interaction)
Given a user clicks a WO block, when click fires, then side panel opens; drag handlers are absent (RTL asserts no onDragStart)
